lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: Hello, and welcome to The Dark Lord's temple. Zamorak will reward those who offer the bones of the vanquished on his altar.

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: I can exchange banknotes for bones, should you require such a service.

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: My services, however, are not free. I charge 50 coins per banknote.

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: That is not important. I am here to facilitate your offerings to The Dark Lord. Would you like any bone banknotes exchanged?

sections.title: Using any non-noted item on him

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: I exchange banknotes for real items. That's not a banknote.

sections.title: Using any noted item that cannot be sacrificed on the altar on him

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: I only exchange items that can be offered as a sacrifice to The Dark Lord's altar.

sections.title: If the player does not have at least 50 coins

lines.speaker: Elder Chaos druid
lines.text: I charge 50 coins for exchanging each banknote.
